title: palicourea lucidula
intro: Palicourea lucidula, also known as 'Huito' or 'Limoncillo', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine in the Amazon region for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Palicourea lucidula include its ability to treat fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and hypertension. Herbal preparations of Palicourea lucidula typically involve infusions of the leaves or roots, which can be consumed as teas or used in tinctures and topical applications.
